Meta.Lifecycle: TEMPORARY — archive directory unchanged after production cutover, do not maintain
Meta.Policy: pre-Beads draft; bd_id appears only when a chunk is started via bd create

RunState.Notes: Chunks 18 and 19 closed under parent MVP epic without breakdown entries (handled directly via feature-workflow per chunk). This breakdown captures the remaining code-chunks up to production cutover.

Decision.Question: Where does Stage-0 classifier output land?
Decision.Choice: DefaultPipeline injects Classifier protocol; classifier.classify(text|transcript) → ClassifyResult{intent, domain, confidence, time_hint?}; result staged via Inbox.stage_text/stage_voice

Decision.Question: Streaming edits trigger
Decision.Choice: StreamEditor activates only when WikiRunner.estimated_duration_s > 5 (D-026 threshold); otherwise single final deliver_output

Decision.Question: Document mime routing
Decision.Choice: application/pdf → ocr stage; text/* → inline stage; image/* → photo stage (existing); else → reject with "тип файла пока не поддерживается"

Chunk.title: M-TG-PIPELINE-CLASSIFIER — wire classifier+runner+deliver_output into DefaultPipeline
Chunk.scope: Replace ack-only responses in DefaultPipeline.on_text and on_voice with the full ingest pipeline: Stage-0 Haiku Classifier → Inbox.stage_text/stage_voice (with L2 dedup on text-sha256) → WikiRunner.run (Stage-1a/1b Sonnet) → deliver_output (hybrid size policy). Inject Classifier + Inbox + WikiRunner + DeliverOutput protocols via DefaultPipeline constructor (back-compat for None: fall back to current acks). Add tg.pipeline.* log markers: classify.begin/done, inbox.staged, runner.dispatched, deliver.sent.
Chunk.depends_on: M-CLASSIFIER-STAGE0, M-WIKI-RUNNER, M-INBOX (stage_text/stage_voice + L2 dedup), M-TG-TEXT (deliver_output), M-TG-HANDLERS-WIRING (DefaultPipeline seam), M-RUNTIME-WIRING (constructor)

exit_criteria.criterion: DefaultPipeline.on_text("привет") invokes Classifier → Inbox → WikiRunner → deliver_output exactly once
L2 idempotency: identical text within window dedups at Inbox, no second WikiRunner spawn
__main__.py composes Classifier/WikiRunner/Inbox dependencies and passes to DefaultPipeline
Unit tests: ≥10 new tests covering happy path, L1 dedup, L2 dedup, classifier error → fallback ack, runner timeout → audit + safe reply
Integration test (RUN_INTEGRATION=1): real Claude CLI call replies non-empty text within 60s

Chunk.rationale: Closes the core MVP-launch gap: bot currently acks but does not invoke Claude. Building blocks all exist, this is composition only.

Chunk.title: M-TG-PIPELINE-STREAMING — wire StreamEditor for long-running WikiRunner jobs
Chunk.scope: Wrap WikiRunner.run with StreamEditor (1.5s throttle, Δ50 chars, chain-split at 4000) when estimated_duration_s > 5 (DEC-L2). Initial placeholder message ("Думаю…") edited in-place with streaming chunks; final flush guarantees full text even on exception (D-026). Emit tg.pipeline.stream.{begin,chunk,final,error} log markers.

exit_criteria.criterion: Slow runner (mock 10s) produces ≥3 edits to placeholder message before final
Fast runner (mock 1s) skips streaming, uses single deliver_output
Runner exception → final flush of accumulated text + audit log entry
chain-split at 4000 chars triggers new message with (i/M) footer (D-026)
Unit tests: ≥6 new tests; HTML-safe edit boundaries asserted; full quality gate green

Chunk.rationale: UX: 60s+ Claude responses without feedback feel like timeout. Streaming closes the perceived-latency gap.

Chunk.title: M-TG-DOCUMENT-FULL — document handler mime routing, staging, L2 dedup
Chunk.scope: Replace ack-only DefaultPipeline.on_document with mime-based routing (DEC-L3): pdf → OCR stage (reuse photo OCR path), text/* → inline as text input, image/* → photo stage, else → polite rejection. L2 dedup via Inbox.seen_files on doc_sha256 (D-018). Filename PII redaction tier-2 (existing M-OPS-PII).
Chunk.depends_on: chunk-20, M-INBOX (seen_files L2), M-OPS-PII (filename tier-2 hash), M-TG-MEDIA (photo OCR reuse)

exit_criteria.criterion: PDF upload → OCR → Inbox staged → WikiRunner reply
Unsupported mime → reject with ru-only message, no audit error
L2 dedup: identical doc within window → audit DedupHit, no re-staging
Unit tests: ≥8 new tests across 4 mime branches + dedup + rejection

Chunk.rationale: Document handler is the last category-level gap. Acks are acceptable as placeholder but not for launch.

Chunk.title: M-INTEGRATION-E2E — integration suite with real Claude CLI + aiogram test-client
Chunk.scope: Add tests/integration/test_e2e_pipeline.py: spin up DefaultPipeline against real Claude CLI (gated by RUN_INTEGRATION=1) and a FakeAiogramBot. Cover scenarios: text turn (classify → runner → deliver), voice turn (STT → classify → runner → deliver), confirm callback resolve, document PDF turn. Add make integration target; document in runbook/operations.md.

exit_criteria.criterion: RUN_INTEGRATION=1 uv run pytest tests/integration/test_e2e_pipeline.py passes locally in ≤180s
≥4 scenarios green: text, voice, photo+confirm, pdf
Make integration target added; CI nightly hook documented (not enabled — manual nightly)

Chunk.rationale: Unit tests assume mocks; integration is the final safety net before production cutover.

Breakdown.CutoverGate: Production cutover is NOT a code chunk. After chunk 23 closes, follow docs/superpowers/plans/20260511-ai-steward-wiki-launch/cutover-checklist.md sequentially. Treat the checklist as a runbook with sign-off, not a development task.
